programme.title: Kongsuni and Friends
programme.desc: For five-year-old Kongsuni life is one big adventure.

programme.title: Cocobi Sing-Alongs Toys
programme.desc: Sing along to popular kid's songs with Cocobi toys!

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Jenny's Magic Shop
programme.desc: Jenny and her best friend Blam the Teddy Bear run a magic shop in the town of Dreamville, where everybody can come for magical help. The residents of Dreamville always leave the shop thanking Jenny, but actually, they set the stage for their own miracles, leaving behind in the shop whatever is keeping them from living life and making decisions. After all, the ability to change yourself is the truest form of magic. Jenny and Blam never refuse to help anyone, but it often happens that they're the ones who need help, since Jenny's still a kid and Blam's an eccentric teddy bear.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Helper Car
programme.desc: Cartoon for kids about helper cars: a fire truck, an ambulance, a police car and a tow truck. Why these cars and trucks are useful? Because they help people and other cars: fire truck can put out fire, ambulance helps people, when they are hurt or sick, it could drive them to the hospital. Police car patrols the city. Tow truck help other cars, when they are broken down. Watch new car cartoon and learn about helper cars!

programme.title: TurboZaurs
programme.desc: The adventures of dinosaur's squad transforming into big machines who are willing to solve any difficulties that kids may face in their everyday life.

programme.title: EL MUNDO DE ROSIE
programme.desc: El Mundo de Rosie es un hito en series de animación preescolar que se emite en V-Me en Las Americas y en más de 170 países en todo el mundo.

programme.desc: Take a musical trip every morning with Down by the Bay, Outside my window I see, Car Song and more!

programme.title: Franklin and Friends
programme.desc: "Franklin and Friends," based on the children's book series featuring Franklin, is a computer-animated series geared toward preschoolers that aims to teach the kids lessons. The series follows Franklin the turtle, now older than in the books and previous TV series, as he experiences adventures and achieves milestones in the community of Woodland, learning lessons along the way. Franklin's friends referenced in the title include best friend Bear, problem-solving Snail, practical joker Rabbit, natural leader Beaver, inventive Fox and empathetic Goose. The series tackles issues that include personal empowerment, socialization, self-esteem, appreciation of nature and school issues.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child's play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. "Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: A pesar de toda nuestra sofisticación y tecnología moderna, desconocemos mucho de lo que yace bajo nuestras pisadas, en las profundidades de la Tierra. ¿Qué hay en el centro de nuestro planeta?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Prácticas antiguas como rezos, deportes sanguinarios, exorcismos y el vudú son consideradas reliquias supersticiosas... Sin embargo, existen pruebas de que tienen un impacto en la realidad.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Millones de personas por todo el mundo aseguran haber tenido un encuentro con una criatura que no ha sido reconocida por la ciencia, como el hombre polilla, el chupacabras o el gusano de la muerte mongol. ¿Existirán estas creaturas increíbles?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Danzas mortales. Expertos en manipulación. Suicidios masivos. Asesinato. Muchos de los cultos más letales del mundo se internaron en un peligroso espacio de ideologías perversas, convenciendo a sus miembros de matar a otras personas o a sí mismos.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Profetas modernos. Premoniciones catastróficas. Sueños sobre crímenes futuros. ¿Puede la gente predecir el futuro? Y si es así, ¿podemos aprovechar este conocimiento para evitar eventos mortales que tarde o temprano nos podrían alcanzar?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Los monumentos de Estados Unidos son, sin lugar a dudas, impresionantes por su enorme tamaño y alcance, por sus innovadores logros de ingeniería y por sus historias legendarias. ¿Por qué seguirán cautivándonos los más grandes monumentos estadounidenses?

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara reconoce a Arnulfo, el ex de Miriam, y lo confronta. Martín arruina la velada romántica entre Aracely y Plutarco. Eliodoro entrevista a los nuevos compradores de su mercancía.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.sub-title: Con las manos en el dinero
programme.desc: Sara y Eliodoro tienen problemas para cruzar la frontera e intentan sobornar al guardia. Aracely recibe una feliz noticia, mientras Josefina vuelve a ser víctima de los abusos de Felipe.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara está lista para dejar el negocio después de hacer un último trabajo, el más difícil y riesgoso hasta el momento. Tuercas se vende al mejor postor. Josefina le cuenta todo a Carlota.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara cae manos del comandante Cortes, Eliodoro no puede hacer nada y el Indio Amaro celebra. Salvador ya no cree en las promesas de su madre. La sirvienta de Berta da una impactante noticia.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara está en peligro y quieren que pague por el pasado de Vicente. Eliodoro pide ayuda y Quintanilla pacta con el Indio Amaro. Salvador rompe las reglas y responde una llamada telefónica.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Felipe y Sara se atacan mutuamente y él le deja claro que se está jugando la vida. Quintanilla rompe relación con Elio. Miriam y Joaquín se preparan para cruzar la frontera.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Un problema de plomería conduce a un descubrimiento que debe ser investigado. La DEA intenta atrapar al Indio Amaro y descubre que él va por Elio. Miriam y Joaquín llegan a la frontera.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: La DEA le ofrece un trato a Sara, su libertad a cambio de su padrino. Miriam encuentra a su hijo. Edith ingresa a la prisión en calidad de encubierta. El Indio Amaro ofrece una recompensa.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Elio ya no tiene protección y recibe un disparo del sicario del Indio Amaro. Edith escucha a escondidas la conversación privada de Sara y le cuenta a Marcelo. Cruz ataca a Visitación.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: El embrión es un remedio Combatiendo a la tecnología
programme.desc: Valeria y Javier concibieron otro hijo para que le donara la médula a su hija con leucemia. La niña falleció y ahora Valeria quiere interrumpir el embarazo. Un niño de cuatro años es adicto a la tecnología.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: La maldición de los Torres Los tres barberos
programme.desc: Una joven fue secuestrada y su familia pagó con lo que tenían para lograr su liberación. Harold, Fernando y Omar trabajaban en la misma barbería, pero una broma pesada los arruinó.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Terapista de carretera Dame lo que es mío
programme.desc: Sergio tiene serias sospechas de que su esposa lo engaña: ella es conductora de Uber y siempre carga condones. Además, Alberto se cortó el pene por accidente y en el hospital se lo pegaron mal.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Me muero por la gimnasia Papá por fuera, mamá por dentro
programme.desc: El hermano de Denise es un gimnasta profesional que tras una operación no puede competir, pero él insiste. Alía es un hombre en proceso de transformación a mujer, pero su esposa ya no soporta eso.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Héctor cumplió condena por violación a la hija de María, pero al salir en libertad fue baleado. En otro caso, Esmeralda y su exesposo perdieron todo tras el paso del huracán Harvey.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: Eduardo tiene una casa, en su país, que alquilaba a sus hermanos, pero estos vendieron la propiedad varias veces. También, Ulises tiene una cafetería que está a punto de quebrar por su hijo.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: María perdió a mi hijo Felizmente cornudo
programme.desc: Ivete quiere ir a Puerto Rico en busca de su hijo desaparecido tras el paso del huracán María, pero su esposo se niega. Cornelio ha soportado las infidelidades de su esposa y no quiere el divorcio.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.sub-title: Tráfico de órganos para niños Gamers
programme.desc: El hijo de Abby y Jaime necesita otro corazón, pero no aparece un donante, por lo que Jaime piensa ir al mercado negro. La madrastra se opone a que Lucas explote el talento de su hermano en videojuegos.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.desc: Keith Martin y Peter Klutt nos muestran autos clásicos como un Thunderbird '57, un clásico Cadillac de 1948 y un Packard de 1929.

programme.title: Grandes Equipos
programme.desc: Echamos un vistazo al Museo del Automóvil de Saratoga antes de los viajes a Auburn, Indiana, y al evento de primavera de Auction America.

programme.title: Por la Ciudad
programme.desc: Hoy se trata de ir rápido y verse bien al mismo tiempo con un Porsche 356B de 1963, un moderno Ford GT y un deportivo Studebaker.

programme.title: Muscle Cars en Auburn
programme.desc: Regresamos a Auburn para Auctions America. Se destaca un GTO Judge, un Oldsmobile 442 y un atractivo Corvette con ventana dividida.

programme.title: Esto es guerra
programme.desc: Un concurso juvenil que divide a los concursantes en dos equipos mixtos, cada equipo con un capitán y un reto por cumplir que es ordenado por el tribunal.

programme.title: Renovación
programme.desc: La corriente de Humboldt es más lenta que la mayoría, pero es la más dinámica del mundo porque viaja una distancia muy larga.

programme.title: La Llegada
programme.desc: La corriente es seguida por una población única de ballenas azules chilenas y es el último refugio para mamíferos marinos extremadamente raros.

programme.title: Oso pardo
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, rastrea a un oso pardo macho que incursiona por primera vez en Yellowstone Spring luego de su hibernación invernal.

programme.title: Bisonte
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, nos acerca al magnífico bisonte. Caminamos por el camino del bisonte con una de las manadas que regresa a Yellowstone.

programme.title: Puma
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, fotógrafo de la vida salvaje, se encuentra con una puma en su rancho y descubre que tiene varias bocas que alimentar.

programme.title: Serpientes
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, encuentra un nido de serpientes de cascabel invernando en las tierras hostiles de la pradera de Wyoming.

programme.title: Los Perros de Huracán Dorian
programme.desc: Doug Thron va al rescate con su dron desde las Bahamas, devastadas por huracanes, hasta las incendiadas colinas de California.

programme.title: Los Perros Perdidos de Louisiana
programme.desc: Doug se dirige a Louisiana para ayudar a un bombero a encontrar a su perro y comenzar las operaciones de rescate en Lake Charles.

programme.title: 13 Días Después del Huracán Laura
programme.desc: Junto a Aja Estro, un rescatista de animales, Doug, continúa sus misiones de búsqueda y rescate a través de la ciudad de Lake Charles.

programme.title: Los Gatos del Incendio de Oregon
programme.desc: Doug se dirige a los vecindarios carbonizados de Talent, Oregon, junto a Shannon Jay, para salvar a los felinos que quedaron allí.

programme.title: Persiguiendo a Ghost
programme.desc: Doug registra a algunos de los perros que ha rescatado, y luego dirige su atención la boxer que pasó 15 meses sobreviviendo por sí misma.

programme.title: Los Perros de la Isla
programme.desc: Doug lleva su dron a la República Dominicana para rescatar a los cachorros que han sido abandonados en el vertedero de la ciudad.

programme.title: Hienas Urbanas
programme.desc: Doug viaja a Malawi para trabajar con investigadores de las hienas, ansiosos por usar su dron. La cámara infrarroja los sorprenderá a todos.

programme.title: Contacto
programme.desc: Minerva B, un pequeño planeta similar a la Tierra, alberga agua, moléculas orgánicas y criaturas complejas. ¡Artemis ha encontrado vida!

programme.title: Velocidad

programme.title: Caídas
programme.desc: Rob Bell descubre cómo nuestro miedo a caer es explotado por algunas de las atracciones de los mejores parques temáticos del mundo.

programme.title: Altura
programme.desc: El ingeniero Rob Bell sube a cuatro espectaculares montañas rusas en Europa y Estados Unidos que explotan nuestro miedo a las alturas.

programme.title: Inversión
programme.desc: Rob Bell investiga cuatro montañas rusas en Europa y Estados Unidos que utilizan inversiones, o bucles, para crear atracciones emocionantes.

programme.title: Largo
programme.desc: El ingeniero y aventurero Rob Bell investiga cuatro de las montañas rusas más largas de Europa y Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Psicología
programme.desc: Rob Bell investiga cuatro atracciones de parques temáticos en Europa y América que utilizan trucos psicológicos para aumentar la emoción.

programme.title: Philip Catherine, Jean-Louis Rassinfosse & Chet Baker
programme.sub-title: Jazz a la Grand Place Chet Baker Trio
programme.desc: Two top-tier Belgian musicians – guitarist Philip Catherine and bassist Jean-Louis Rassinfosse – accompany American jazz trumpeter and vocalist Chet Baker during this 1985 performance at the beautiful Brussels Jazz Club, located on the Grand-Place, the Belgian capital's central square. The trio plays Charlie Mariano's “Crystal Bells”, the title track of their acclaimed 1983 album. Other songs played during this legendary concert include “Down” and “How Deep is the Ocean”.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Double bassist Avishai Cohen's trio with Noam David (drums) and Omri Mor (pianist) joined forces with the international Symphony Orchestra ‘INSO-Lviv', conducted by Christian Schumann. On June 24, 2017 they brought Avishai Cohen's signature blend of influences from Eastern Europe, American jazz and the Middle East to the Alfa Jazz Festival in Lviv, Ukraine. Cohen, who also supplies vocalizations in the Judeo-Spanish dialect Ladino, came to prominence internationally in the 1990s when jazz great Chick Corea offered him a place in his trio and a recording deal. Thirty years later, Cohen has become a house-hold name himself, leaving his Ukrainian audience enthralled and connected through the universal language of music.

programme.title: Art Farmer
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Aki Rissanen, Antti Lotjonen & Teppo Mäkynen
programme.sub-title: Aki Rissanen Trio at Jazzclub Unterfahrt, Munich
programme.desc: Aki Rissanen's interest in jazz came after he started taking classical piano lessons. His deep interest in improvised music placed him among top jazz pianist in his home country - Finland. While composing and performing his own music, Rissanen has also collaborated with Verneri Pohjola and Dave Liebman, and today his name appears among the top European jazz musicians. Live from 'Jazzclub Unterfahrt' in Munich, Germany, together with Antti Lotjonen on bass and Teppo Makynen on drums, Rissanen showcases the best of Scandinavian jazz and its DNA - the Nordic Tone.

programme.title: Cannonball Adderley, Nat Adderley, Yusuf Lateef & Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: Cannonball Adderley: Live in '63 boasts two beautifully filmed concerts from one of the most celebrated sextets in jazz history, captured at the top of their game. Cannonball Adderley (alto sax), Nat Adderley (cornet), and the masterful Yusef Lateef (tenor sax, flute, oboe), provide a massive three-horn frontline attack, while the stellar rhythm section featuring a pre-Weather Report Joe Zawinul (piano), Sam Jones (bass), and Louis Hayes (drums) fuel the songs with a deep infectious swing. Quincy Jones' "Jessica's Day" leaps from the gate with a huge big band sound that is extraordinary for only six musicians. This recording is a reminder that Cannonball Adderley was one of the most outstanding and highly respected alto saxophonists in the history of jazz. He was a bluesy jazzman who could play anything in superb fashion.

programme.title: Rahsaan Roland Kirk
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Anita Oday, Göran Engdahl, Roman Dylag & John Poole
programme.desc: Anita O'Day boasts two wonderful concerts from 1963 and 1970 that present the “jazz singer supreme” in impeccable form. O'Day's horn-based approach to singing is in full effect throughout both shows including stand-out renditions in each show of audience favorites “Tea For Two” and “Sweet Georgia Brown” (both reprised from her triumphant appearance at the 1958 Newport Jazz Festival.) This show is a fitting testimony to one of jazz music's true originals and shows unequivocally why she is ranked in the top tier of vocalists along with Ella Fitzgerald, Sarah Vaughan, and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Works by Bach, Bartók, and Brahms
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, Béla Bartók, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bach's Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of Bartók's best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the work's instrumentation: Bartók divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahms's Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: Jan Latham-Koenig, Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen & Pascal Amoyel
programme.sub-title: Grieg's Piano Concerto & Beethoven Symphony No. 7
programme.desc: Conductor Jan Latham-Koenig leads the Flanders Symphony Orchestra in this concert recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, on April 21, 2016. The program opens with Felix Mendelssohn's concert overture Die Hebriden, Op. 26 (The Hebrides). During a trip to Scotland, the composer was deeply impressed by the natural splendor of Staffa, an island of the Inner Hebrides, which inspired him to compose his concert overture. Next on the program is Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor, Op. 16, featuring Pascal Amoyel as the pianist. It is the composer's only concerto. Grieg composed the work in 1868, drawing inspiration from Norwegian folk music. The program ends with Ludwig van Beethoven's Symphony No. 7 in A major, Op. 92. The work is very popular, especially because of its touching second movement. At the Allegretto's 1813 premiere, the audience demanded an immediate encore.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Violin Concerto No. 5 in A major, K. 219, also known as the ‘Turkish Concerto'. Leading violinist Grimal features as the soloist. With the exception of the first violin concerto, Mozart composed his other four violin concertos in 1775 at a time when he was concertmaster at the Salzburg court. It is the third and final movement that gives Concerto No. 5 its nickname, the ‘Turkish Concerto'. This movement features a striking middle section of ‘Turkish music', which the composer achieves not only by changing the meter, and the mode to minor, but also by letting the cellos and basses play col legno - creating a percussive sound with the wood of their bow. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Jodie Devos
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Herbert Blomstedt & Lucerne Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Piano Concerto No. 1 & Symphony No. 2
programme.desc: At the age of seven, Argentine pianist Martha Argerich made her debut with Ludwig van Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 1 in C major, Op. 15, a piece that would accompany her throughout her career. The celebrated pianist performs this signature piece at the Lucerne Festival with the Lucerne Festival Orchestra under the baton of Swedish conductor Herbert Blomstedt, who makes his festival debut with the orchestra. Beethoven's Symphony No. 2 in D major, Op. 36, is also on the program. This performance was recorded at the Lucerne Culture and Congress Center (KKL), Switzerland, in August 2020.

programme.title: David Bateson, Tuva Semmingsen, Cassandra Lemoine & Bjørn Fjæstad
programme.sub-title: Fantasymphony – A Concert of Fire and Magic
programme.desc: The Danish National Symphony Orchestra once again opens the gates to magical worlds with an enchanting concert program. Under the baton of German conductor Christian Schumann, the Danish National Symphony Orchestra, Danish National Concert Choir, and Danish National Junior Choir team up to perform music from the most popular fantasy movies, TV series and video games, including The Lord of The Rings, Game of Thrones, The Hobbit, The Witcher, and League of Legends. Featured soloists in this concert are Norwegian mezzo-soprano Tuva Semmingsen, Canadian-Portuguese soprano Cassandra Lemoine, Danish musician Bjørn Fjæstad, and British actor David Bateson. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in April 2023.

programme.title: Meat Loaf
programme.desc: American musician and actor is noted for the Bat Out of Hell trilogy of albums, consisting of Bat Out of Hell, Bat Out of Hell II: Back into Hell, and Bat Out of Hell III: The Monster is Loose. Bat Out of Hell has sold more than 43 million copies worldwide. Almost 40 years after its release, it still sells an estimated 200,000 copies annually, and stayed on the charts for over nine years, making it one of the best selling albums of all time. He is one of the best-selling music artists of all time, with worldwide sales of more than 80 million records. He has also appeared in over 50 movies and television shows, sometimes as himself or as characters resembling his stage persona. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic artist.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: Flying Over Iceland: Part I is a stunning yet soothing aerial journey to the remote fjiords and valleys of eastern Iceland. The first of a series of 1 hour films, Part I begins at sunrise on a perfect summer day in Breiðdalsvík, where a golden sun lights up the majestic valley. After soaring through the golden sea mists and offering a glimpse of the stunning Breiðdalur Valley (its name means ‘Wide Valley'), viewers then head inland to a hidden, magical arched waterfall for a refreshing immersive flight that begins at the base of the falls and reaches above the clouds. Next, as the morning turns into a sunlit afternoon, viewers are swept inland to the crystal clear waters of the the impressive Breiðdalsá river, to cool off in some falls along with a pair of local swans. Well known for salmon fishing, the turquoise blue river winds its way scenically across the valley basin to the sea, which is where the film ends - but not before a chance encounter with a local reindeer! The final flight in Part 1 offers a sunny afternoon look at the tiny village of Breiðdalsvík from afar and offers amazing blue water vistas of with green islands, seagulls, a rock island that that looks like a cat, a scenic lighthouse, and more.

programme.title: Return to Paradise 1
programme.desc: Escape to one of the world's most idyllic tropical islands for 2 hours of relaxing on the beach with "Return to Paradise,." The sequel to "A Day in Paradise" (2014), the film returns viewers to the hidden exotic Fijian island of Nanuku - a tiny palm-covered sandy atoll surrounded by magical lagoons brimming with sea life. The film lasts for 2 full hours and features a dynamic mix of stunning tropical island beach & palm tree scenes that will gently transport viewers around the island. Each scene lasts several minutes, allowing time to soak up the views & absorb the healing energies which paradise provides! There are also some aerial drone clips to give the viewer perspective from above.
